title: xanthophyllum cockburnii
intro: Xanthophyllum cockburnii, also known as a tropical tree, is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum cockburnii include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues. Xanthophyllum cockburnii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
